column1: GARAGE SCHOLARS — SCHOLAR PAY STRUCTURE (ALL SERVICES)
Pay Model: 50% Guaranteed Base (paid for taking the job)  +  50% Performance Stipend (good score + no complaints upon completion)
Standard Rates:  Lead Scholar = $47/hour   |   Wingman = $40/hour   |   Pay calculated at midpoint of hour range
📊  PAY SUMMARY — ALL SERVICES AT A GLANCE

column2: 50% Base → Paid same day for showing up and completing the job
50% Performance → Released 48 hours after completion (pending review window)
✅  Job completed within quoted hour range
✅  Worksite left clean — all debris, packaging, tools removed
✅  Professional conduct — respectful, on time, no phone use
❌  Client complaint filed → Full stipend forfeited
Scholar can appeal within 5 business days. Review by management.
